What is a shoping?The shop is where some manufacturer, retailer, salesman has some product and puts it on the market, so an interested buyer needs the product that needs it for their needs.The buyer tells the seller that this product will be purchased, agreed on the price, reached an agreement, the buyer would pay the goods, take over the goods, all happy and satisfied.But not with pkwteile.de company.14,05,2018. Monday morning, I log in to your site at best, I place the order for the offered items that you have offered on the site, with a note that they are available immediately, that is, from the warehouse.I pay, not with credit card, rather than choosing a payment immediately, Sofortüberweisung, believing in honest salesmen intention, pkwteile.deFrom the site PKWteile.deSofortüberweisung:Sofortüberweisung ist das Direct-Überweisungsverfahren der Payment Network AG. What's Sofortüberweisung stellen Sie noch während Ihrer Bestellung bequem eine Überweisung über den jeweiligen Betrag in Ihr Online-Banking-Konto ein. Wir erhalten nach der Abschluss der Sofortüberweisung eine Echtzeitbestätigung. So the Lagerware sofort versenden werden - Sie erhalten dann Ihre Bestellung schneller.The first mistake, I did not check the reliability and references of the seller.With experience in German, I expect delivery next week, actually there was always less, but I gave a seven-day deadline, closing the site convinced that everything would go well.On the same day, in the afternoon, I receive a mail notification, not from a seller, but from a billing company that with they work. I go to the bank account and really, The billing company took the amount in €, how much the order price was ordered, plus the delivery costs, which is implied.Okay, that is, with the experience of buying, of course not on that page, but with some others, I conclude that the order is in preparation and that parts will arrive in a reasonable time.At the end of the week, five days have passed, I go to the pkw teile internet store page to see what's going on with my paid order.I sign up to the page, and I see the order still standing in my account, as if it was not paid, and waiting for some confirmation. It's Saturday 19.05.2018. I think it's a weekend, okay to look after the holidays.22.05.2018 I open the page again, no changes in my account and my € are already in the company's account. I do not really care about the terms of payment, I just want my ordered parts. I go a bit to research the General Terms and Conditions on pkwteile.de site, and find a sentence that says:After receiving your order we will automatically send you an email containing the following information on your order:- description of items, amount, price (I have not received)- delivery costs that may arise (I have not received)- these terms and conditions, information on your rights and conditions to cancel the order (I have not received)- the chosen method of payment and delivery (I have not received)A contract will not be concluded until we send you an email confirming the order or informing you that your goodshave been dispatched. ( i am still waiting, 28,05,2018,)In case we refuse your order we will inform you immediately via email.After that, I investigate which e mail  I would be able to regret to not deliver my order and find it at infopkwteile.de.At this address I send a brief note of the title: "Wo sind meine ersatzteile?" expecting some feedback in a reasonable time.Disappointed for everything I've read, I come to the conclusion that I have lost my paid and paid order, and thus the money I earned is out of the pkw teile.de site.Everything I planned, I could not accomplish, and i planed 20 days in advance.However, this business will not just leave forgiveness, it just begins.Today, 28,05,2018, on my pkwteile.de account, nothing happened, for them everything is cool.-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------29,05,2018,Thank You for the fast response,Where does this answer say that you do not have any products at the warehouse and offer other products that are more expensive than those you've presented on your page as available? Trustpilot does not allow printscreen publishing, so I just copy the introduction from your email:❗️Nur heute gibt es Schnäppchenpreise auf die Produkte in Ihrem Einkaufswagen!Sie grübeln immer noch?Es ist an der Zeit, den Kaufabzuschließen und Ihr Autovor schweren Schäden zuschützen!zurück zum einkaufswagenI can not conclude from the mail I received that you have no spare parts available but can only be concluded if, when all together, some other parts are offered and more expensive for about 20%.It is a customer deception in every normal business.The buyer orders the goods on your page for one price, the buyer orders the goods, pays in advance, is expecting the delivery, and you then inform it after 7 days, even though the money is already in your account that you do not have ordered parts, and if the buyer wants to get other parts , but at a higher price.Sorry, that's not business, and so does not work.30,05,2018,Tomorrow is a holiday, of course I do not expect any response, normally.I sent mail to you. I am very interested in further development of the event. If I got parts in time, I'd be on my way home.

It all started when I wanted new engine parts for my Mercedes engine. I ordered all my parts, paid for them (stupid move) and after two weeks the items were delievered. I got my main bearings, rod bearings and gasket set to the wrong car. I sent them back at MY cost and now they tell me I can't get my money back. I must buy parts for the remaining money (240Euro). This company is the worst i have ever come in contact with and I would never EVER recommend this site to anyone! This is not legal to do!

I the past I have experienced excellent service from this supplier, both in Greece and France. HOWEVER NOW on my latest order despite them having all my details and membership on their web site they insist on my sending them various items of ID. Photo / scanned copies of my ID card or driving license and part numbers of my credit card.  The credit card security department has strongly advised me NOT to do this, so Pkwteile will not send me the goods yet they HAVE TAKEN MY MONEY off my credit card!Definitely now too hard to deal with, shop elsewhere!

The correct part was sent very promptly and I was impressed by the value for money. Would definitely use you again.

At the end this was great buying experience after all the trouble Mr-auto gave me.From order to shipping it took about 2 working days.Parcel was packaged nicely, original package had good protection.Shipping with UPS is huge plus - shipment tracking worked fine and package arrived 3 days later.Only deduction is the amount of registered alternative websites (autonvaraosat24.fi, topautoosat.fi) directing to same PKWTEILE address in Josef-Orlopp-Straße 55. This was the only thing that made me cautious. I can understand localized websites but having two different alternative "shop brands" connected to the same company made me almost turn around and go away. Glad I didn't and had guts to order because of trusted shops certificate.Pleasant surprise afterall.

We had a lot of problems with the customer service and after a bad review i was contacted by the customer service in Sweden and we found a perfect solution for all the problems so now I am confident that in the future we will not encounter them any more. Regarding the products they are super good quality.

Fuel pump on my car was broken = car could not run. I order a new at PKW teile. But after a week I had not received it. I called the company, and was told that they had cancelled my order (without telling me) because the fuel pump was not in stock. I said that they had 4 different types of fuel pumps on their home page. And asked if they could deliver one of those instead. They promised to check and call back within an hour. That is a week ago. They have still not called

I had ordered some spare parts from the company and the money was transferred within 2 days. But there was not sent any spare part to me. After a week I started asking for the order (several times) and just got the know every time that it would be sent the same day. After 14 days without any sign of sending the packages I was informed that the brakes were not in stock and that I instead could get some equivalent for the same price . I said yes right away, but still had to inquire for the order several times before I after 3 weeks received the parts ordered . When I opened the package, there were only one set of brake discs and not 2 as I ordered. I therefore again contacts the company and after having sent the documentation they required, I was told that the missing parts would be shipped the 17/2-14 . This were 1.5 months after I sent my order.I still have not received the package and the company says only that it is sent by UPS , but will not inform about the track and trace number. I do not expect ever to see the lacking brake disc ...SO GREAT WARNING - Do not use this company !

Was first promised the parts on tuesday, then certainly on thursday, and now they are definitely shipped this week,... still waiting.If your car is broken and you need parts faster than a few weeks, look elsewhere.EDIT after pkwteile tried to erase my review:I eventually received the part, but it did not fit, and I did not have time to wait for another part. Luckily it could be made to fit with a hammer.

🇫🇷 FrançaisLors de ma première expérience, j’ai rencontré certains problèmes. Même si le processus a pris du temps, mon souci a finalement été résolu, ce qui m’a satisfait.À l’avenir, je pourrais envisager de faire de nouveau des achats sur votre site. Cependant, pour renforcer la confiance et éviter ce type de désagrément, il serait très utile d’intégrer un système permettant d’enregistrer le numéro de châssis des véhicules.En effet, le fait de se baser uniquement sur la marque, le modèle et l’année ne semble pas suffisant. L’ajout d’une recherche par numéro de châssis, ainsi que la possibilité d’associer ce numéro à un véhicule enregistré, permettrait de réduire considérablement les erreurs de compatibilité, même si une compatibilité à 100 % ne peut jamais être totalement garantie.Si une telle fonctionnalité est mise en place, je serais tout à fait disposé à continuer mes achats sur votre plateforme.J’espère sincèrement que ce type de problème ne se reproduira pas à l’avenir. Merci à AUTODOC pour la résolution de mon problème.NOTE: De plus, j'accède à votre site web via autodoc.be, et la langue par défaut devrait être le français, mais il s'ouvre constamment en néerlandais, ce qui est très agaçant :)---------------🇬🇧 EnglishDuring my first experience, I encountered some issues. Although the process took some time, my problem was eventually resolved, and I appreciate that.In the future, I would consider shopping on your website again. However, to improve reliability and prevent similar issues, it would be highly beneficial to implement a system that allows customers to register their vehicle’s chassis (VIN) number.Relying solely on brand, model, and year appears to be insufficient. Adding a search option based on the chassis number, as well as allowing users to link this number to their saved vehicles, would significantly reduce compatibility errors—even if a 100% guarantee cannot always be ensured.If such a feature is implemented, I would be willing to continue using your platform for future purchases.I sincerely hope that similar issues will not occur again. Thank you to AUTODOC for resolving my case.NOTE: Also, I access your website via autodoc.be, and the default language should be French, but it constantly opens in Dutch, which is very annoying :)

Lisa Dale was the one who handled the claim and refused my returns given me explanation as to why I’m returning never used and sealed items order no. 100177556 you placed 23/11/2023.Also refused to log me a complaint and refused to escalate to a manager please avoid this fraud company
supplier_response: Hi Imran Shaban! We noticed that you left several identical reviews on our company profile. Your case has already been transferred to the quality control department. UPD We have additionally checked the information in your order based on your review. We are very sorry that you had such an impression of our service. However, we would like to draw your attention to the fact that you have applied for a return of an order for 2023. There are established return periods that must be adhered to. The "Safe Order" service for which you paid additionally extends the return period to 200 days, which have already expired. Therefore, your statement about fraud is not true. At the same time, we are always happy to make a decision in favor of the client. Our manager has already contacted you and provided the necessary assistance. We would greatly appreciate it if you could let us know in your feedback what progress has been made in resolving this issue. If you have any questions, please contact us at trust@autodoc.eu. Best regards, AUTODOC Team

It's now been more than a week and still not received. Don't even have an estimated date of delivery.

review_text: Update:Been already waiting 7 days for a battery for my vehicle I'm going to work with and counting. This is a dropshipper.  I thought that I bought a battery (which was in stock) at autodoc.be in Belgium were I live. But in fact without knowing, I bought the battery in Germany. Normally this is not a problem when you order it from a company that is not  a dropshipper. So when my order comes in, they have to notify the real company that has the part you want. And that takes long. A good webcompany must be able to send you your part (when it is in stock within 2 days). I order often paint in The Netherlands, next day: here is your paint sir.  Tracking It says already 2 days:  Your order is with the shippingcompany.Everything arrived correct and packed with care on day 8.
supplier_response: Dear Customer, Thank you for letting us know that you have received your order. Once again, please accept our apologies for the inconvenience and the fact that the delivery took longer than expected. For our part, we will continue to work to make the delivery faster and better. Please, feel free to contact us at traust@ autodoc.be if you have any questions. Our specialists are always ready to provide professional help. Best regards, AUTODOC Team

review_text: Edited review:I received a wrong item due to incorrect description on the website. Initially they wanted me to pay return shipping so I made a comment here on Trustpilot.I was answered by Xena from Customer Service who took it up and helped sort it out quickly and me to get a full refund.5 stars for XenaThe 4 stars are for Autodoc which still needs to improve some things in my opinion: delivery times and ease of returns, among other things.For exaple I get things ordered from NL the next day delivered to BE, so that's where I base my expectations on.
supplier_response: Hello Stefan, We're incredibly sorry about your disappointment with our service. Please note that by registration number you can only limit the list of parts to parts that fit your car model. The final check for compatibility is possible only with the help of the OEN (Original Equipment Number). Before placing an order, you should check the OEN indicated in the description of the item. Please note, that we offer a SO (Safe Order) option at checkout which allows you to return within 200 days and gives you a free return label. Please contact us at help@autodoc.de and provide your order number so our quality control manager can identify you and find your order in our system and check everything. Best Regards, AUTODOC Team

review_text: There should be no individual shipping charges for multiple large items purchased at once!!

Unfortunately, such products as, for example, a bumper and a hood cannot be packed in one box, do you agree with us? We really hope for your understanding and a more positive assessment of our work. After all, our task is to deliver the goods in proper condition, and we treat this with full responsibility. Leaving a positive review would be a fantastic way to show your support. If you have questions feel free to contact us at trust@autodoc.be. Best regards, AUTODOC team

review_text: Ordered several parts, one of them being a rear muffler of an old Polo. This thing is maybe 1m long. Ordered on 27/5, today, 6/6 it still shows it's somewhere in transit in Germany. However, I had to pay extra €50(!!!) because it's "oversized". Customer online help is useless, repeating the same automated line that it's oversized and it will arrive, eventually. I ordered much bigger things in the past like an engine crane, never had to pay any "oversided" fee and then wait 2 weeks for it to arrive. Useless and not to use if you need the parts quickly. Oh, eventhough I paid autodoc, now it's not their problem and I have to discuss it further with the shipping company NOX. Easy peasy, right, it's my problem now? Oh yeah, as my packages are still somewhere in Germany 6 days on the same place, without any updates, it's worth mentionaing that autodoc uses a shipping company which has 0(!!) positive reviews, just 12 1-star complaints. As to the answer below, I'm still waitingUpdate: 10/6 contacted support via chat (only option). They see that the packages didn't move for almost a week now. They will contact NOX to verify the situation. When will I get the answer? They don't know this, I have to wait. They don't even know themselves how to get information from a shipping company they use and for which they charge in total almost €75 to deliver a small muffler.Update 14/6: I didn't even hear once from the customer service and ordered parts still in the same place somewhere in Germany. Nox.express doing Nox things I guess. Meanwhile my car is still off the road. I guess I will have to rent one and bill autodoc. If they would put half the effort they're putting in trying to get my reviews removed, into solving the issue, it would maybe progress things.
supplier_response: Hello, We are sorry to hear you faced any inconvenience. Our quality control manager will look into the issue that occurred and get back to you in the shortest term. Best Regards, AUTODOC Team

I ordered a throttle body (MAGNETI MARELLI 802000000197, order ref. FRD-505-294-058) from Motointegrator France.After installation, the part turned out to be defective — unstable idle, throttle angle oscillating between −100° and −50°.I filled out and sent the official warranty form provided by Motointegrator, clearly explaining the issue and that my car is equipped with a 2.0 AZJ engine (not 1.6 BSE).Despite that, their technical support rejected the claim based only on the VIN, ignoring the documentation I submitted.Their website clearly says “Returns within 30 days”, but they refuse to apply this policy or provide an RMA / return address.Very disappointing service — no real support, just automatic replies.I do not recommend this seller: they do not respect their own return policy nor basic EU consumer rights.
supplier_response: Hello, We’re sorry to hear about the difficulties you’ve encountered with your order and the warranty process. This situation does not reflect the level of service we aim to provide. Please contact our customer service team again, providing your order reference and any supporting documentation, so that we can review your case in detail and help you find a suitable solution. Kind regards, The Motointegrator Team

Ordered some new Springs for my car. Webshop showed me different options for "sports" "non-sports" "IDS". I have the non sports model. So I got one of the compatible options. Turns out they are way too stiff. I had to pick another of the options without further description. Now I cant send them back because I already used them. Apparently you are supposed to know that all the options that the webshop offers you are different (without any difference in the descriptions) and call them to find the fitting part for you. But if you do that, the friendly employee will always get you the most expensive option, that is really compatible with your car (hopefully).Well a short warning in the webshop about that "common knowledge" would have been nice... or some kind of help after the fact instead of "yeah just buy another part from us, and good luck with this one". Never again!

I ordered some parts, not a large order, around 35€. Paid by card online using my online bank app. Within seconds my banking app showed the money had been removed. The website then informed me that the sale could not go through. I contacted KFZ and, in fairness, the advisor did investigate it for me. She said the money would not have been taken and to some extent she is correct. The amount is still showing, on my banking app, as waiting for the merchant to claim. I contacted my bank, they said the merchant needed to cancel the money transfer. KFZ refused to do this. Obviously I will get the money back, eventually, but I will have to wait 22 days. On the other occasions this has happened the Merchants have cancelled the money transfer within 3 days.I have asked for an explanation why the sale was refused and why the cancellation of the money request could not be done sooner. I am still waiting for a reply from KFZteile.  Not good enough.

Sending a battery for the car is easy, but ...it was not so easy to leave the old one back to the shop and get back your deposit. The online service is good as every online shop and you get your car pieces very fast. Very helpfull is the selection procedure to find your own special car. They send the parts as soon as possible. Just sending a battery is a little bit tricky, because it needs dangerous goods declaration. By the way, the more complicate thing is to send back the old one for getting the deposit back. Maybe the mistake was, bringing to the local shop in Berlin. Than you need show your original bill, you need say them the correct payment method, you use for pay. Than ... you need wait and wait and wait. Several messages later ... you get it on your creditcard, without any other sign or mail or comments ... that's was the blahs, you don't want.
The only possible way to keep the contact with the provider is the quality of his goods and service. In this case it's accomplished and I'm satisfied for the moment.

Terribly rude customer care.I was a regular customer, I'm done. Called their German customer care and the representative literally told me off like a child for not realising which of the many car/part numbers he wanted to hear and then hang up on me!There are many other shops for car parts, I don't beg shops to take my money.

German is not my mother tongue so I am writing in English.I have ordered twice at kfzteile24.de and twice they managed to make mistakes.The first time they sent a wrong part. It was labelled wrong in their stock, mistakes happen and I could return the part at no cost (international shipment!), so I won't blame them at that point. But then I got the very same, wrong part again! They didn't learn from their mistake... So I had to send back again (at their expense), and had to wait again for the replacement. Finally I got the correct part. But it took a lot of e-mails with their customer support and four weeks altogether...Last week I ordered again, a fairly large amount of parts. They sent me an e-mail that one part wasn't in stock, so they offered to send another brand (more expensive) at the same cost. Hooray for their service, I really appreciated it. But what they actually sent me, was an opened box with a used part! It got scratches and dirt on it! As it was still useable and had cost me only 10 Euro (normal price in local stores 25 Euro so still a bargain) I decided to use the part anyway and sent them an angry e-mail instead. Which they never answered...A friend of mine also had bad experience with kfzteile24, ordered a cilinder head gasket for an 8V cilinder head and got one for a 16V cilinder head instead. He had to talk endlessly to their customer support to get *their* fault rectified.I will hesistate to do business with them again. Pity, because if they didn't f*ck up every time, they would get five stars as they deliver quality branded parts for very reasonable prices.

I´ve now ordered 3 times and I get the spare parts very fast.The quality of their products are really good, for example I purchased a catalytic  convertor for my Mitsubishi Space Star and it was just like the original, fit perfectly.I would recommend kfzteile.

review_text: I have ordered 2 Bilstein air struts for Mercedes and the first thing was that the price on the website was 695€ per piece but when I confirmed the order the price was suddenly 712€ per piece. I finished the order and made a payment via PayPal immediately. I got the confirmation of my order and payment. Then first few days the status of the order didn't change at all, then it was that items are in a transfer from one warehouse to another and then finally that the items are waiting for shipping company to pick them up. And then it starts... After 2 weeks! the status was still the same so I contacted them. Next day they called me that those parts are not available and asked if they can send me  some replacement from different producer. When I asked them how is this even possible regarding the fact that exactly the same parts are still available on their website with the info "In Stock" they replied that the parts are in another warehouse so if I want those I need to wait additional few days. And I waited another 4 days and then I got a call that they can send me those parts but now the price is almost 1000€ higher!!!!! So at the end they wanted almost double the price for the parts which were already payed and confirmed 3 weeks ago (and status of my order was already "warten auf abholung durch transportfirma")!!! When I didn't agree to pay additional 1000€ they simply said that they will cancel my order and make a refund. This is really unacceptable and unprofessional or you can call it a scam!Never ever again!!!EDIT: I sent an email as suggested in reply below. Now it has been one week since I sent them an email and I didn't even get the reply. Nothing. Zero. Those replies from this company here are just an attempt to look like they care but in fact it is just another scam of theirs!
supplier_response: Dear Mohor Smid, We are sorry for the inconvenience caused. Please, contact us at trust@autoteiledirekt.de and provide us with order details. Our Quality Control team will check the information and answer your questions. Best Regards, Your Autoteiledirekt Team.

supplier_response: Sehr geehrter Herr Schneider, vielen Dank für Ihre Mitteilung. 1. Eine Suche nur mit Fahrzeugauswahl oder anhand KBA-Nummer nicht immer ausreichend, da nur die FIN die Ausstattung sowie alle individuelle Besonderheiten einzelnes Autos berücksichtigt. Aufgrund OEM-Nummern kann man auch eine ausreichende Auswahl durchzuführen da diese Nummern zur direkten Übereinstimmung zwischen der gleichen Teile verschiedener Hersteller führen. Beachten Sie bitte auch was auf der Warenkarte steht: " Bitte beachten Sie, dass die abschließende Überprüfung der Kompatibilität nur mit Hilfe der sogenannten OEN ( Original Equipment Number) möglich ist. Die Beschreibung unserer Produkte enthalten nur technische Spezifikationen und können deren Kompatibilität mit einem bestimmten Fahrzeug nicht garantieren. Bevor Sie  eine Bestellung aufgeben , sollen Sie die in der Beschreibung des entsprechenden Artikels angegebene OEN überprüfen". 2. Sie haben beim Auftrag keine Option Sicher Kaufen gewählt, daher trägt der Kunde Rückversandkosten. Wir haben Ihnen unsere Anfrage per E-Mail gesendet und warten auf Ihre Antwort. Beachten Sie bitte dass Sie uns jederzeit per: trust@autoteiledirekt.de erreichen. Mit freundlichen Grüßen, Ihr Autoteiledirekt Team

This review is for the company Autodoc or autoteiledirekt.de (they seem to operate under a bunch of different names, so I posted here and on Autodoc reviews).The short version: Absolutely terrible customer service, bordering on a scam. Order somewhere else!The very long one for those who care:I ordered a bunch of parts from them and to be fair the items are what I expected and do their jobs but 2 days after the items were supposed to be at my house (shipped inside Germany so no excuse there) I called them up and after pretty unfriendly interaction with their customer service guy I got promised that it would go out that day. So, if it says 2 days, expect a week.While I was talking to him I noticed the parts where now 30 Euros cheaper on a 200 Euro order and I asked him for a deal. I would have taken store credit, even a complimentary sponge or a packet of gummy bears or something that showed any interest in their customers, but he wasn't willing to budge. Fair enough there too, they don't have to.So, I told him I would just order the stuff again and return the first package and since they already delivered the parts too late for me I had all the time in the world (second package was late by the same time frame too). I even bought their safe order (sicher bestellen) feature on the first order, which states that I can return the uninstalled parts for a full refund for any reason within a 100 days or something like that. Since the boxes are just sitting here and haven’t even been opened it shouldn't have been a problem.A week after I filed for the return I haven't even gotten a mail saying that it is being processed other than their automated instant reply so I called them up again. I didn’t even get an answer the first 4 times I called even though it kept telling me constantly I was next in line. After 15 Minutes and 27 Seconds you get dropped from the line each time so you get to try again. I have a headset and plenty of time while i was doing other things so I just kept calling. Even tried calling them from 3 lines at once (I got bored) and you get the same message on all of them. That was around 10am on a regular business day. Never got through to anyone then so I tried again in the afternoon and after the second round of waiting I actually got someone who couldn't even say hello or good bye or anything and I tried my best to be extra friendly. I got some results in the form of six emails (one for each part I ordered) saying my return was accepted and an attached PDF Return Form for every part. Seemed like progress but it also said that my return mailers would come in separate emails which still haven't arrived 5 days later.I guess I will listening to some more annoying music and automated messages next week. At this point I fully expect them to either not answer at all or at best be extremely rude again. Chances of me getting the full refund, that their extra safe order service promises are slim to none and I bet they will give me the full runaround for that too.Calling it what it is at this point is a Scam.I will change this review accordingly if they manage to surprise me and not do any of that, after all terrible service and late deliveries aren't a scam if the parts are what you bought but at this point it sure looks like a Scam when it comes to their return policies and safe order options.Update (26.06.2018):I guess complaining loudly on the internet does help since their english speaking customer service called me up first thing monday and sent me the return mailer (just one though even though I got two boxes but since they already had all the heavy stuff in one box and the 2 super light things in a seperate one I figured they might as well go in a single box. Didn't want to argue over this but I took a bunch of pictures anyway). The english speaking customer service rep was very nice, which was a welcome change so I guess I'll be carefully optimistic and wait.Update (09.07.2018):Turns out they actually did send me three labels - in yet again three separate emails - just two ended up in spam. I guess since it took 40something emails (not even kidding) to get to this point. So I sent the three packages in the same arrangement they came here and apparently they received them on Jul. 2nd. Still waiting to hear anything further. Don't hold your breath on getting your money in any sort of timely fashion back. Mind you I started the Process over a month ago on June 3rd. I do realize the return proves and banks and all that take their sweet time too. I don't have a problem with that, but this is just ridiculous. How does a company with that terrible of a customer service stay in business these days? I've head better customer service from Indian tech support scammers than these guys. I’m curious what happens next. My guess is I do get some money back at some point or another but not even close to the amount I paid with all kinds of bogus charges and “service” fees as a justification. I guess we will see.
supplier_response: Dear customer, thank you very much for your request. It is very regrettable to hear that you have not been satisfied with the terms of delivery. We would ask you to contact customer service for a solution with the forwarding company, thank you in advance for your efforts! We have sent you the return Form. Please print the return mark on an A4 paper, separate the return label at the marked point and stick it on your return. When you have some further questions, please contact us: trust@autoteildirekt.de. With the best regards, Your Autoteiledirekt Team

review_text: Deutsche Übersetzung weiter unten._______________________________It took 8 days to answer my matter about a product that did not fit!I ordered a lock cylinder (with two keys) with the correct OE number and to fit my car (also according to VIN code/ chassis number and registration number, but in the box was a completely wrong model. The support blames me that did not look up properly before purchase and that I am responsible for shipping (which costs more than the product is worth). Has sent pictures of comparisons between the products, but the support does not care and does not look up with the manufacturer. I do not know which cars it fits and therefore can not sell it, so I'll scrape it.Order from Autoteiledirekt if you think you will not have any problems with the products, but otherwise avoid!……….................................................Update!I have finally received free shipping back for the lock cylinder, but I think Autoteiledirekt has taken a long time to realize the mistake that is mainly the manufacturer's.It should be added that the number on the product itself is correct._______________________________Es dauerte 8 Tage, um meine Frage zu einem Produkt zu beantworten, das nicht passte!Ich bestellte einen Schließzylinder (mit zwei Schlüsseln) mit der richtigen OE-Nummer und für mein Auto (auch nach FIN/ Fahrgestellnummer und Zulassungsnummer, aber in der Box war ein völlig falsches Modell. Die Unterstützung beschuldigt mich, dass ich vor dem Kauf nicht richtig nachgesehen habe und dass ich für den Versand verantwortlich bin (was mehr kostet als das Produkt wert ist). Hat Bilder von Vergleichen zwischen den Produkten gesendet, aber die Unterstützung ist egal und nicht beim Hersteller nachschlagen.Ich weiß nicht, welche Autos es passt und kann es daher nicht verkaufen, also werde ich es kratzen.Bestellen Sie beim Autoteiledirekt, wenn Sie der Meinung sind, dass Sie keine Probleme mit den Produkten haben, aber vermeiden Sie dies!……….................................................Aktualisierung!Ich habe endlich kostenlosen Versand für den Schließzylinder bekommen, aber ich denke, dass Autoteiledirekt lange gedauert hat, um den Fehler zu erkennen, der in erster Linie der Hersteller ist.Es sollte hinzugefügt werden, dass die Nummer des Produkts selbst korrekt ist.

This is my review following my installation of two rear, complete strut assemblies for my 2013 Cayenne Diesel (with standard suspension).The reason I am giving these struts only 2 stars is because although the parts looked like decent quality when they arrived, (a) they were extremely difficult to install, and (b) the rear ride height is now higher by about 2.5 inches than the front.I believe the Aerosus replica strut assemblies are longer than the OEMs but, I cannot be absolutely sure because I did not measure them against the OEMs I removed.   Why?   Because both of the rear springs on the OEMs had broken so any measurement would not have been accurate.However, if I could post pictures on this review, you - the reader  - can judge for yourself WHETHER the rear ride height looks normal.  With the OEMs, there was no differential ... I believe ... and even if there was, it was not noticeable to the naked eye.Look, maybe the Aerosus replicas will "settle down"  as the company claims.  If it does, then, I will retract this review and post a new one.  For now, this review is accurate

supplier_response: Hi Joshua, Thank you for your feedback. We sincerely apologise for the frustration this situation caused. While we strive to provide quality products, we understand that the experience you had with us fell short. Our team has worked with you to resolve the matter, and we have already processed the refund for your order. We truly regret that it took longer than anticipated to resolve this, and we appreciate your patience during the process. At Aerosus, we value customer feedback and are constantly improving our processes to ensure better and more efficient service. We hope that moving forward, your experience with us is much more positive. Thank you for your understanding.

I needed to buy a solenoid for an Aerosus Compressor I bought new two years ago, I contacted Aerosus directly as I couldn’t find a source for the part, I was told that Aerosus do not supply spare parts for their compressors, so I’ve had to right off a two year old compressor for the sake of a £20 to £30 part.This is shockingly bad service from Aerosus, I will never buy another or recommend anyone buying a product from them.
supplier_response: Dear David, Thank you for your feedback, and we’re sorry to hear about your experience. We’d like to clarify that at Aerosus, we typically do not provide spare parts separately. This is because we believe in the quality and reliability of our parts. Instead of offering repairs or refurbishing for warranty cases, we prefer to offer a fully new part to ensure the highest performance and durability. It’s also important to note that the compressor you purchased was unfortunately not compatible with your vehicle, and we did not receive any request to verify compatibility prior to your purchase. Our Customer Satisfaction team has already reached out to you via email, and we’re more than happy to assist you in finding the best solution. We encourage you to continue the conversation with us so we can resolve this matter to your satisfaction. Thank you for your understanding, and we look forward to helping you further. Best regards, The Aerosus Team

I ordered a compressor for an FO1 BMW 7 series. When fitted it made a sound like a pressure washer. It was 100x louder than an OEM compressor and physically not of the quality of an OEM part (they repackage the same cheap Chinese compressors seen on eBay, and label them as "tested in Germany"). I contacted Aerosus, who were not as fast to respond as I would expect. They arranged for it to be returned, assessed it, and then despite me asking for a refund, attempted to ship me a new one. As it stands, they are refusing to fully refund what I paid, claiming this is a "shipping administration" charge. If you need air suspension parts, either buy genuine, or the OEM parts (typically car air compressors are made by WABCO). Avoid Aerosus at all costs.

supplier_response: Dear Customer, We sincerely regret the inconvenience you encountered with your recent order and the issues you faced with the products. Ensuring your satisfaction is our top priority, and we appreciate the opportunity to address your concerns. Our company policy generally does not allow refunds for orders beyond 30 days, as stated in our Terms and Conditions. However, given the exceptional nature of your situation and our commitment to customer satisfaction, we have decided to make an exception in this instance. We have processed a full refund for your order, including the delivery and processing fees, which are typically non-refundable. We hope this resolution helps to alleviate the difficulties you experienced. Please be assured that our products are developed to meet the highest standards of quality. Your feedback is invaluable, and we continually strive to ensure our products meet and exceed these high standards. Thank you for your patience and understanding throughout this process. If you have any further questions or require additional assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us. We look forward to serving you better in the future. Best regards, Aerosus Team

Poor customer service.1.I place the order online.Two days after no message at all from Bandel2.I inqure about the status ( already paid in full , to be clear) of my order and I get a replay that my order is not active as the address is faulty !3.Thank you Bandel, I will send the corect address via e-mail on the spot.4.I recevie response that now everything îs fine and the order is dispatched.5.I get a tracking number and when I check the status of my package I find ouț that my staff is ready to be shipped Internațional!!!6.I write back to the same useless Bandel rep that messed up my order and till now I did not get any replay from his side nor from Bandel side.Very disapointed Bandel !Very bad image,poor attitude no comments.I see strong marketing,big words on how many products you have, how many years of experience yet Bandel is unable to do one order correct.I talk about my first and only experience with Bandel.You better invest a lot in your employees,train them coach them guide them how to be effecient and effective.As from my standing point you are nowere near the spot.I will ask Bandel to refund my money back and promise I will never bother you with anyorder.I use the competition 9 ouț of 10 Times where everything goes very easy , great customer suport!But they did not have what I was looking for !With your mistake you ruined my plans I made just before Christmas counting on your proper service.And please have a one on one talk to the Rep.employee ( I have his name ) that did not bother to answer back and tell him that is extremely rude on his attitude.About his ability to fulfill his job, he failed from my side.
amazing . alles perfect.

El mes de noviembre 2022 he comprado a través de eBay un catalizador para un Mini Cooper S cual me ha llegado con defectos en las roscas de los sensores y las chapas de sujeción también,cosa que he reclamado y me han devuelto 20€ de un total de 201€ ... hoy mes de octubre 2023( 11 meses más tarde )tenía que pasar la inspección técnica del vehículo y me han puesto falta grave por los gases porque el catalizador ya no hace bien su función.. según la garantía que dan por el catalizador la tienda BANDEL AUTOMOTIVE me deberían de devolver la cantidad entera de la pieza más la mano de obra de montaje cosa que yo no lo he reclamado y me he puesto en contacto con ellos a través de eBay por donde he realizado la compra y les he enviando foto del resultado de gases de la ITV pero ellos me dicen que la pieza ya no tiene garantía....parece que muchas tiendas online de Alemania están siguiendo los pasos de China tanto en calidad como la forma de los tratos con los clientes .... MUCHO CUIDADO CON ESTA EMPRESA 👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎...yo seguiré dejando este mismo comentario en todas las páginas que aparecen en la web además les voy a reclamar a través de la OCU y por lo menos recuperar el dinero del catalizadorIn November 2022, I purchased a catalytic converter for a Mini Cooper S through eBay, which arrived with defects in the threads of the sensors and the fastening plates as well, which I complained about and they refunded me €20 of the total. of €201... today October 2023 (11 months later) I had to pass the technical inspection of the vehicle and they gave me a serious fault for the gases because the catalyst no longer does its job well... according to the guarantee they give For the catalyst, the BANDEL AUTOMOTIVE store should refund me the entire amount of the part plus the assembly labor, which I have not claimed and I have contacted them through eBay where I made the purchase and I have sent them a photo of the MOT gas result but they tell me that the part no longer has a warranty....it seems that many online stores in Germany are following in China's footsteps both in quality and in the way they deal with them. clients.... BE VERY CAREFUL WITH THIS COMPANY 👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎... I will continue leaving this same comment on all the pages that appear on the website and I will also complain to them through the OCU and at least recover the money from the catalyst

review_text: The parts came fast, with a good quality and packaging

Worthwhile. More expensive than other suppliers however they did not try to use Evri to deliver - which is a deal breaker. (I have stopped using Autodoc because they use Evri and also tack on a crafty £4 'return insurance' on every order... soon builds up...) In addition I could pay an extra £2 to have their tech check that I was buying the correct part. Given the masses of variants of my car / engine this was worth doing. About a weeks wait for UK delivery which is fair from EU these days. Keep purchases under the flag 'duty' limit and you won't get charged extra. You will pay shipping - however if you prefer service and reliability over price then Trodo beats the other budget EU offerings.

review_text: Helpful staff and order arrived in time. Highly recommended.

It would be helpful to have a normal courier service (for eg. The equivalent of parcel force / royal mail) where it may take a bit longer for delivery, but the shipping cost would then not be as expensive or more expensive than the parts ordered.Nevertheless, happy to use trodo.com for the professional service. Keep up the good work!

I’ve ordered from Trodo several times and haven’t had any negative experiences so far. Their vehicle compatibility verification is probably the most useful service they offer. I highly recommend using it if you’re unsure whether the parts you’re looking at will fit your car.

This is a disaster. I don't recommend this company to anyone. I ordered a rim, they sent me a different size, I sent them back at my own expense, they re-sent them to a different address, they returned them, and they re-sent them, and the rims arrived two months later. I opened the package and, to my surprise, the rim was scratched! It also had two paint chips. Of course, the seller doesn't care. What ignorance and treating customers like garbage. Never again. The matter has been referred to the Consumer Federation.This is a response to lies, lies, and more lies.. You're just trying to exonerate yourself, but the truth is, as I wrote, you don't care about customers or the regulations that protect them. The company's policy is focused on salespeople, not customers. So it's no wonder customers are dissatisfied with your company's service. You run a business based on commissions from other companies and thrive on ripping off customers, which you profit from, but you don't care about customer rights. and you are still lying that you sent the parcel to Poland when no one gave you such an address. This company should be closed. The financial and tax authorities should deal with you. You are selfish. How can someone send damaged goods and tell them you're not interested and the matter is closed? This is just rudeness, not a serious company.
supplier_response: Guten Tag, vielen Dank für Ihre Bewertung. Wir bedauern sehr, dass Sie den Vorgang so negativ wahrgenommen haben. Gerne möchten wir den Ablauf jedoch richtigstellen: Sie haben uns mitgeteilt, dass die Felge ursprünglich in einer falschen Größe bestellt wurde. Eine Rücksendung ist in diesem Fall selbstverständlich möglich, allerdings haben wir Sie vorab transparent über die anfallenden Rücksendekosten in Höhe von 14,88 € informiert. Die Felge ist bei uns anschließend bereits beschädigt und zerkratzt eingetroffen. Aus diesem Grund konnte die Rückgabe leider nicht akzeptiert werden, da eine Rücknahme nur bei unbeschädigter Ware möglich ist. Die Felge wurde daraufhin, wie von Ihnen gewünscht, an Ihre Lieferadresse in Polen versendet. Wir bedauern, dass es zu Unannehmlichkeiten gekommen ist, möchten jedoch betonen, dass wir den Vorgang entsprechend unserer Rückgabebedingungen und nachvollziehbar bearbeitet haben. Herzliche Grüße aus St.Johann Ihr Team von rsu_gmbh

I ordered 4 rims from RSU. I found RSU through Idealo.de. Everything went smoothly to a few weeks after the delivery. Then i suddenly got an invoice of 123 euros for the delivery. When I ordered the delivery costs were 0 euro. When you check the "Bezahlung & Versand" it says Alle Felgen Versandkostenfrei. They have now sent me more invoices and threaten with a debt collection firm. They say it´s because I am living in Finland and they don´t send to Finland and still they did.  There was no announcement about not delivering to Finland, when I ordered. They have informed me that there is some note about this where the customer questions are. Why should the customer read all the questions, when it says that the Shipment is "free shipping". You can check this by going to RSU.de and choose a rim and put it in the shopping cart and choose an address in Finland. The delivery cost is 0 euro. Their way of making business on the internet is not legal. You are not allowed to send invoices afterwards. The customer has to see all costs, when he/she is making the order. I hope they will write off the illegal invoice for delivery. My Customer number is 1320705.

They canceled my order and then increased the price by 60 EUR for the same tires. They offered me a 5 EUR voucher. Really "nice"!Edit after their response:I just wanted to add that the price wasn't utopian and unrealistic at all because just two weeks ago the "market" price for these tires was even lower. You (and others) just artificially increased it due to the current demand. It is just greedy and that's why my rating won't change.The next day (after you canceled my order) I ordered from a different seller for an even lower price than your "utopian" crazy low mistake price.
supplier_response: Guten Tag, vielen Dank für Ihre Bewertung. Wir entschuldigen uns für die Unannehmlichkeiten bei Ihrer Bestellung, das ist auf jeden Fall nicht unsere Art und ein Fehler den wir sehr bedauern. Wir hatten an diesem Tag einen Fehler bei unserer Preiskalkulation, weshalb uns komplett falsche Daten übermittelt wurden. Aufgrund der falschen Datenübermittlung waren einige unserer Produkte für kurze Zeit zu einem völlig unrealistischen und utopischen Preis in unserem Onlineshop verfügbar. Die Preise waren schlicht fernab der Realität. Wir konnten diesen Fehler erst einige Minuten später berichtigen und mussten daraufhin Ihre Bestellung leider stornieren, wir haben Sie dazu auch per E-mail benachrichtigt. Ein solcher Fehler gewiss nicht die Regel und wir geben unser bestes, dass uns so etwas in Zukunft nicht mehr auftritt. Für die entstandenen Unannehmlichkeiten möchten wir uns Entschuldigen, wir können Ihren Ärger verstehen und sind genauso frustriert, dass uns so ein Missgeschick passiert ist. Gerne dürfen Sie unseren Kundenservice kontaktieren und wir können gemeinsam nach einer passenden Alternative suchen. Herzliche Grüße aus St.Johann Ihr Team von RSU.de

The second delivery came without an announcement so before I could pick it up it was send back.Due to it all not being my fault, Motointegrator covered the shipping costs, so that I only had to pay them once.It was my first-time ordering at Motointegrator so I gladly gave them the benefit of the doubt and they morally did good. review_text: Hello all, I just need to leave my feedback for an ordered placed by Monday 21/07/2025. I order it and Thursday it comes the courier to leave the package as UPS informed but there was nobody at home and also the courier didn’t left any note or advice that he passed by. After figuring out via track and trace they mentioned on the tracker the package will be delivered next day by Friday. Waiting for the package next they Friday, UPS uploaded the status of my package as damaged. Straight away I have called to customer service from NL and a lady names Kasia she attended me saying that she received an email from UPS with information the package is damaged. I told her to send me another package with all same items if those ones are damaged. She told me that the rules are different ones and that I have to wait until the package will arrive back to the warehouse for evaluation and then I will receive my money back, in the meantime I can order again paying of course for the second time. I explained her in the phone that is not fear that I should solve this situation spending money from my pocket for some items I didn’t even receive and she told me that these are the rules and she cannot do nothing about it. Now my question is, why the customer service didn’t want to cancel my order knowing there is a problem with a damage package, also explained her on the phone that the car is dismantled on the garage and every day I have to spend money for keeping the car there because it’s about water pump and the dual mass from the gear box. The only response I have received it was that Che cannot talk to me anymore because I do not want to understand the rules she explained me on the phone and above mentioned on this complaint. I hope somebody from Motointegrator that supervise the orders can give an answer to this because when I asked lady Kasia for a supervisor or somebody who’s has power to decide she said that there is nobody who can help me. In my opinion this lady shouldn’t work anymore on customer service.
supplier_response: Dear customer, Thank you very much for your detailed explanation. We are truly sorry to hear that your experience with our delivery and customer service has been so disappointing. We fully understand how frustrating this situation must be for you, especially given the urgent need for the parts and the costs you are incurring as a result. Unfortunately, in the event of damage during transport, we are dependent on the return procedure of the carrier, in this case UPS. According to the applicable procedures, we can only process a refund or a new shipment after the damaged package has been returned and received by us. However, we understand that this procedure is not ideal in situations such as yours, where time and clarity are crucial. We regret that you felt you were not heard in your conversation with our colleague, but in her defence, I can only say that she and the entire customer service team are highly competent. She gave you the best solution within her capabilities. I would like to add that the company is now so large that it is no longer possible to quickly complete a new order from the warehouse. The warehouse is fully automated. Processes that have been set in motion must run their course as they are. Perhaps this is not so much about the rules we have to follow, but rather the procedures that cannot be interrupted in such a large company. Customer service works online from home. And my colleagues in customer service are very competent and friendly. I hope you can understand this. We would still like to help you as best we can. If you have any further questions or requests, please contact us again so that we can see if we can still arrange something for you within the existing possibilities. Kind regards, Susanne

review_text: Company claimed next day delivery on website, but took over a week to get here, contacted them 20 mins after making the order before it was shipped to verify, they said it would take a week, but did not want to cancel the order although it was not even shipped yet.  Company poses as being in NL but stuff ships from Poland or something.EDIT after reply : it said "next day" before clicking to buy.  Another point of irritation is the lack of help when trying to cancel an item that wasn't shipped yet, less than an hour after ordering online.  All kinds of nonsense about needing to refuse the part when it arrives (by the way 9 days after ordering) instead of just cancelling the order. Also, the VAT has not been refunded either as was promised.  All in all : just a webshop trying to pouch customers by pretending they have stock in NL, and not willing to help customers.
supplier_response: Dear customer, Thank you very much for your feedback. I am sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations, especially regarding delivery time and communication. However, I am confident that nowhere on the website does it state that we deliver the next day. We do not offer next-day delivery. Delivery takes up to four working days. Once an order has been placed, it is difficult to cancel, as the work in the warehouse is fully automated. It takes 20 minutes to complete an order and prepare it for dispatch. This process is irreversible. Motointegrator is part of Intercars, the largest Polish seller of car parts. We do not pretend to be anything other than what we are: a reliable company based in Poland with a subsidiary in Germany. I hope this has helped to allay your scepticism. I hope you are satisfied with the fuel pump. Kind regards, Susanne

review_text: I ordered a Varta car battery shown as compatible and clearly marked “in stock”, with delivery info stating “dispatch in 1–2 days when the item is in stock.”Order No. 160576547, dated 20/02/2026 (battery €63.49).After they took my payment, I received an email saying that this “order confirmation” is not an acceptance of the order and that they will “accept” the order later. That is unacceptable: they charge you, but still claim the order isn’t accepted.When I contacted customer service, the story kept changing and contradicting itself:•	“The order hasn’t left the warehouse because the battery is still pending in our depot.”•	Then: “Shipping depends on warehouse availability.”•	Then: “It’s available from our supplier but hasn’t arrived to us yet.”•	And the worst part: they said they need to ask a manager to “negotiate” to get it quickly—while the product was advertised as in stock.Bottom line: misleading stock status and delivery times, inconsistent explanations, and no clear dispatch date. I do not recommend this website.

Due to the complexity of the situation involving delivery timelines and the return process, your case has been escalated and one of our managers will personally contact you to review everything in detail and work toward a fair and prompt resolution. While we do our best to ensure timely deliveries and smooth returns, there are instances where courier procedures, supplier availability, or investigation requirements may cause delays. If you are willing, please keep an eye on your phone or email, as our manager will reach out to you shortly. Best regards, AUTODOC Team

review_text: ordered motor oil 9th October.Evri failed to deliver, after having to chase the courier ( Which seemingly Autodoc expected me to do) they confirmed they had lost the parcel. Autodoc refused to refund, claiming while the order was in transit they could not issue a refund. So stupidly, I agreed to have the order resent. That was 27th October. Lo and behold, Evri have lost the parcel again. Here I am , over a month after paying for goods, still not received, still chasing Autodoc and Evri for answers. Autodoc expect me to wait until the 23rd November to be  refunded. Terrible service all round. Chat service is all but useless. Chatbot is no different than speaking to an actual human, they all parrot the same canned lines. Will not use either company again. Not worth the hassle.
supplier_response: Hello Declan! We sincerely apologize for the repeated delivery issues and the inconvenience caused by this situation. Please be assured that our Quality Control Manager will be contacting you shortly to review your case and assist you further. We truly appreciate your patience and understanding while we resolve this matter. Best regards, AUTODOC Team

review_text: I’ve ordered several times from Autodoc. Most of the time, the parts were correct, but they were often poorly packed and exposed to potential scratches or damage.My last order (No. 150947754), however, was a very disappointing experience due to customer support and company policies. The order included, among others, two similar items — one of which arrived in an open package and missing components.I filed a complaint, and the first solution offered was a compensation for the incomplete part in exchange of me accepting the part, which I refused because I needed the full product. Autodoc then informed me that I would have to return the part through a postal office and wait up to six weeks for a replacement.This is unacceptable — I had already paid in advance, received an incomplete product, and now would need to wait another 3–6 weeks for a replacement. Awful customer service and unreasonable return/replacement policies.I have submitted an official complaint and will escalate the case to the European Consumer Centre and Consumer Protection authorities as it looks to me as an abusive approach from Autodoc related to replacement of uncompliant products. Their mistake, but they take no responsibility and no risk to solve the situation. It is simply not acceptable to wait a total of 4–7 weeks from the initial order to receive the correct items.It is the customer that takes all the risk and headaches in a commercial relationship with Autodoc. They charge you in advance,  there is a high level of luck implied to receive all parts complete and undamaged, if there is a problem and you need something replaced you need to take the item to la postal office, wait until received and inspected by Autodoc, then wait a new delivery, hopefully with the right and compliant product… they take absolutely no accountability in this process it is only customer’s money and nerves…I advise avoiding Autodoc and choosing alternative suppliers with more customer-oriented policies and responsive support.
supplier_response: Dear Vlad V., We apologize for the inconvenience caused. There are standard return processing times. We are always committed to handling each case as quickly and efficiently as possible. Your case has been referred to the quality control department and will be considered as soon as possible. If you have any question, feel free to contact us on trust@autodoc.eu. Best regards, Your AUTODOC Team

review_text: Generally good webshop, with decent prices. Support was the thing that disappointed me. Even if webshop, shows that part was compatible with my car, even though TüV certificate proves that part is compatible with my car, even though part manufacturer confirmed that something is wrong with part and recommended me to start claim process over reseller (Autodoc in this case) they tried to make me idiot. Product you're selling on your webshop has it's own specification that whether you stated it in the description or not. So if spring is produced from manufacter with some lowering spec for car with specific homologation number  it should lower car according to manufacturer spec and on top of that TüV certification and approval. So you can buy something from them but in terms of claims you can forget it. Also one time I orderd 2x5l 5w40 oil i got package with 2x4l 5w40, 1l 5w40 and 1l 5w30. I didn't submit any claim just sent them a message to be more careful next time (I was lucky since I needed only 8,5l). For everithing written in this review I have pictures  and proofs (copy of chat with support also).
supplier_response: Hello Marko B.! Thank you for sharing such detailed feedback — we truly appreciate you taking the time to explain your experience. We sincerely regret the inconvenience you faced regarding the compatibility issue and the way your concern was handled. This is not the level of service we aim to provide. Our quality and claims team will personally review your case to ensure it’s properly resolved and that you receive the assistance you deserve. We also appreciate your understanding regarding the oil mix-up — we’ll make sure this feedback is shared internally to help prevent similar issues in the future. Best regards, AUTODOC Team

review_text: Terrible company, terrible delivery, terrible policies, terrible customer service.This company makes it as hard as possible for you to cancel an order.This has to be done in writing using a specific format before the parts are marked as shipped.This is a problem because this company marks the parts as shipped quickly, but does not ship them, they do this to stop you cancelling your order.Their terms state you must wait until you get your parts and arrange a return, this could be weeks, plus you will need to pay postage to return them unless they are faulty or wrong parts.My parts were marked as shipped over 3 days ago, the courier Evri says they still haven't received them. Dodgy practice if you ask me.They state 6-8 days delivery, this must as a minimum be working days, as its been that long since I ordered and they haven't even sent my order yet.If you need your parts anytime in the near future, order somewhere local, you'll be waiting a long time if they arrive at all.The minimum postage to the UK is £8.45, so if your ordering a couple if cheap parts is the hassle and risk worth saving a tenner?They say even though they have received your order and then they have taken your money, this doesn't mean they have accepted your order and then they might return your money in 30 days, if they don't accept it.I won't ever use this sham of a company again.
supplier_response: Dear Paul! We are sorry for any inconvenience caused caused. To cancel the order please just refuse the delivery from courier and inform us about it. The package will be returned to warehouse and you will be refunded. If you have any questions please contact us at trust@autodoc.eu. Best regards, AUTODOC team

review_text: Terrible, frustrating and disgusting customer service. WARNING do not purchase unless you use credit card or paypal type services for protection.They operate a return, refund and new purchase system which is slow, clumsy and open to abuse as in my case they proved their word is not to be trusted.I was delivered a 20mm thick core radiator instead of 40mm. I was treated as guilty from the first response and had to argue my innocence over the next two days. They implied I must have ordered the wrong part for my vehicle and asked to verify VIN etc which was all correct.They could not see the basic logic that it does not matter what car its for etc I ordered 40mm and got 20mm ....so wrong part.Eventually they wanted me to post back at my cost, more arguing they paid but I had to drop at a drop centre an hour away.I was promised refund 24hrs after they received it ( later other promises of 3-5 days and also if I close the dispute), 21 days of sheer frustration I finally got e refund via paypal dispute then escalated to a claim.Even then they left it till the last two days before Paypal automatic settlement, also a number of days of empty promises of settlement implying the delay is waiting for paypal.They never admit fault, in my case they blamed the supplier. The managers are spineless and lazy as they never call when asked.I had a 140km round trip to drop the wrong part off as I thought it would resolve things quickly..Wrong. (I live in rural location)I only had one apology from the one person who actually called me but he was only calling to review and clarify my position but I have received no company apology or compensation for the aggravation or the journey.If it was not for paypal I would have been really screwed!BUYER BEWARE if wrong or faulty parts deliveredThe latest reply, again blaming the supplier shows they take no responsibility...It does not matter if the wrong part was shipped directly by the supplier.Or if the chassis number etc is correct or no.The issue is the wrong size was shipped, photo evidence was provided that the dimensions where wrong.Instead of acknowledging a supply error and correcting it quickly at thier expense, they accused me of the error and made me fight for a refund... Now two years on they are still trying to get rid of my review... why?Even trust pilot reviewed my case after autodoc complained and tried to get it taken down...Paypal was about to refund me as their review was in my favour.My review is a true account of the facts. And despite their cheaper prices I have never used them again and warned others...

supplier_response: Hello Nour, Thank you for your review! We are sorry to hear that you had a bad experience at AUTODOC. We have checked your order and could see that you have ordered a spare part marked ''core part''. When you purchase such spare parts you have to pay a core charge in addition to the price of the spare part itself. According to European legislation, the core charge is the amount that the manufacturer requires as a deposit to guarantee the old spare part is returned for remanufacturing. The core charge is refunded when the old spare part is returned. This information can be easily found on our website under ''Core Exchange'' or ''Stomavgift'' for the Swedish version of our site. Also there it is stated that the return of the old part is to be made at the customer's expenses. Thank you for your understanding! Best regards, Autodoc Team

Experiencia muy desagradable. El sistema de elección de la pieza de coche según matrícula no funciona correctamente y vino una pieza inadecuada. La indefensión de los clientes es absoluta dado que  bien pagas el envío de nuevo o no puedes hacer la devolución. Recomiendo que busquéis otras alternativas a páginas que cumplan las políticas de devolución.A very unpleasant experience. The system for selecting car parts based on license plate numbers doesn't work correctly, and the wrong part arrived. When I requested a return, they forced me to pay for shipping again, even though it was the platform's fault. They intentionally prolonged the communication regarding the return and then told me the return period had expired. Customers are completely helpless, as they are left with no choice but to pay for shipping again or not be able to return the part. I recommend looking for alternative websites that actually comply with return policies.

supplier_response: Hello Catalin! Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback, and first of all, we sincerely apologize for the concern this situation has caused you. We understand how alarming it must have been to receive your parcel and notice that the three cans of Liqui Moly oil were missing, especially considering their value. In similar cases, what most commonly happens is that the oil is separated during transit and returned back to Autodoc by the courier due to transport restrictions or damage-prevention procedures. Certain liquids are sometimes handled separately without prior notice, which can unfortunately create confusion upon delivery. Please rest assured that this matter is being taken seriously. Our Quality Control Manager will be contacting you shortly to review your case in detail and assist you further to ensure a proper resolution. We also truly appreciate that you left a positive review despite this inconvenience. That means a lot to us, and we will do our best to justify your trust and resolve everything as quickly as possible. Best regards, AUTODOC Team
